vibe: Institutional, serious macro analyst's terminal, Bloomberg meets modern fintech

layout.grid_base: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 or gap-6
layout.radius: rounded-md (max 6px) to maintain a rigid institutional feel, no soft borders

surfaces.cards: bg-background_card border border-border_subtle shadow-sm hover:border-border_focus transition-colors duration-200

components.tickers: Top marquee or sticky bar using JetBrains Mono, separated by subtle borders, colored values (Blue for up, Red for down).
components.hero_spx: Large central or top-left section focusing on Live S&P 500 CFD ticker. Stark white, massive monospace type.
components.mag7_heatmap: Bento grid of 7 blocks. Color intensity scales with percentage change. Text overlaid in white/black for contrast.
components.news_feed: Dense, text-heavy list without images. Use 'IBM Plex Sans'. Include tags (e.g., [Morgan Stanley], [Macro]) with mono styling.
components.regime_engine: Prominent status card using stark high-contrast badges (e.g., 'RISK-OFF' in Signal Red with 1px solid border).
components.economic_calendar: Minimalist table layout, rigid grid lines, rows collapse/expand, timestamp in monospace.
components.session_tracker: Visual timeline/clock indicating London Session overlap. Use silver accent color.

motion.interactions: Hover states on cards slightly brighten the border (border-white/25). Do not use excessive scaling.
motion.data_updates: Framer Motion layout animations for sorting data, subtle flash (green/red background fade) when price updates.

logo_url.description: Clean minimalist sophisticated logo for 'Ritchnygie Trading Lab', letters RTL

background_url.description: Abstract dark obsidian texture, subtle glassmorphism geometric shapes, premium financial technology background
background_url.usage: Use selectively as a very low-opacity (10-15%) background for the hero section or the whole app to kill digital flatness, but preserve readability.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly avoid any green-on-black stereotypical 'retail trading' aesthetics. Up ticks should be Signal Blue (#3B82F6), down ticks Signal Red (#EF4444).
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the grid structures, use customized shadcn/ui (tables, badges) for dense data.
Import Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono fonts via Google Fonts or Fontshare.
Ensure the hero SPX CFD is the absolute focal point.
Treat the UI as a serious 'Control Room' - every pixel utilized, no arbitrary white/negative space like a marketing site, but structured density.
Add 'lucide-react' or 'phosphor-icons' for professional, sharp iconography.
